name: STILL LIFE
tagline: Quarterly magazine on the considered domestic interior

brief.name: STILL LIFE
brief.industry: Quarterly print + digital magazine about the considered domestic interior
brief.audience: Readers aged 28-50 who own or rent thoughtfully, interested in slow design, craft objects, food, and how spaces shape lives. Income $80k-300k. Subscribe to MUBI, NYT Cooking, certain Substack writers.
brief.tone: considered, literate, slow, warm, intelligent, sensorial, lived-in, unhurried
brief.references: Kinfolk magazine in its early years, The Gentlewoman, Cereal Magazine, MUBI Notebook, the food essays of Bee Wilson, Apartamento's interiors photography
brief.context: Hero must feature the tagline "On the considered domestic" set in oversized italic display serif. Sections: Hero, Current Issue (Vol. XII feature spread teaser with one large photograph), The Archive (grid of 11 previous issue covers), Departments (4 standing sections: Rooms, Tables, Objects, Letters), Subscribe (3 tiers — digital $48/yr, print $96/yr, both $128/yr). Footer reads as magazine masthead with editor names, contributing writers, ISSN-style metadata.
brief.avoid: Anything that feels like a content marketing blog. Pastel colors. Sans-serif body text. "Click to read more" CTAs. Pop-up newsletter modals. Influencer-style photography.
